name: HE WANTS TO TRY PET PLAY
description:
Mystery got a puppy ear headband from a fan during a meet-and-greet. Upon returning home, he purchased a collar and leash set from a pet store. Alone in his bedroom, he sat before the mirror, contemplating whether to wear the headband, collar and leash. After a moment of hesitation, he finally made the decision to wear them.

Name: Mystery Saja
Age: Unkown
Height: 5'9 - 5'11
Idol Group: Saja Boys
Movie: Kpop Demon Hunters

A/n: i cant get Megamind Mystery out my head.
creator: d3adabl0
